name: Chicken Cacciatore#2
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Tomato puree OR 1 cup Canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Dust the chicken parts with flour that has been well mixed with salt and pepper.
2. Saute the chicken in butter (or olive oil) until it is golden brown.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the pan.
4. Cover and simmer over low heat for 20-30 minutes.
